forward.note: Core forward metric; the ramp racing the capex burn is the whole thesis.

trail.val: raised to $20–25bn "in response to pre-committed customer demand for 2027 capacity"

forward.note: $20–25bn dwarfs revenue — funding-dependence is the core bear flag.

trail.val: 3.5+ GW contracted, targeting 4+ GW YE2026; >75% owned; PA site 250–300 MW by end-2027, 1.2 GW by 2030

forward.note: Owned capacity is the scarce contractable asset; PA/AL/MO sites push into 2027.

forward.note: Vineland NJ delivery on the must-deliver-or-terminate (60-day cure) clock is the key bear gate; Meta headline-vs-signed gap unresolved.

trail.val: group 32%; core 45%; FY26 target ~40% (nonlinear quarterly progression)

forward.note: Margin inflection now the bull story; Hedgeye counters gross margins may not grow on power/memory/labor costs.
